conditional: Arsenal is preparing an approach and is set to make a bid.
headline: Arsenal prepare bid for Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers
body: Arsenal is preparing to approach Aston Villa for Morgan Rogers, with personal terms not expected to be an issue.
text:
Personal terms between Morgan Rogers and Arsenal won't be an issue as #AFC prepare an approach to Aston Villa.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿

givemesport.com/arsenal-open…

Link



Arsenal Open Talks To Sign Morgan Rogers

The Gunners are set to make a bid for the Aston Villa frontman
